_comment: NPC: Tuo Sen (拓山). Canon ID: N63. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Tuo Sen

perception_tiers.spirit_severing: Rival for Tu Si's Ancient God inheritance

note: Rival Ancient God; competed with Wang Lin for Tu Si's inheritance

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.
